MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Tenderloin Housing is present. Represented by Jaime Quijano.
Attorney, Paul Hogarth, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Roger Pryor, is present.
Attorney, Antonio Di Stefano , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Michelle Brant, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-27-2010 is vacated.
